COMMENT: 
Plans that use a co-payment amount rather than a coinsurance percentage will not have a value in this 
field; reference instead the corresponding co-payment variable called (PRE_ICL_INP_COPAY_3M). 
Starting in 2016, CMS changed how they describe pharmacy networks. The INP are currently referred 
to as standard
